summary: The team held a Q2 roadmap planning session for the Identity product, covering three major themes: JIT provisioning and SCIM improvements, adaptive MFA policies, and an Identity audit trail integrated with the Comply module. Technical leads discussed specific failure modes in SCIM sync, a redesigned attribute mapping UI with inline validation, and a phased approach to adaptive MFA starting with location and device posture signals. The session also touched on competitive pressure from SentinelShield, lingering customer trust concerns following a March Detect outage, and cross-team alignment with the Comply team around SOC 2 reporting gaps.
actionItems: Mike Romano: Break Q2 roadmap themes (JIT/SCIM, adaptive MFA, audit trail) into epics in Jira and flag shared infrastructure dependencies by end of week
Jordan Whitfield: Share redesigned attribute mapping designs in Figma in the Identity channel by tomorrow morning for async team feedback
Ananya Sharma: Collaborate with Mike Romano on JIT provisioning and SCIM improvements, targeting a four-to-five week timeline with strong test coverage
Alex Reyes: Follow up with Priya on the Comply team to formalize cross-team alignment on the Identity audit trail API integration

keyMoments.text: Sofia flags a clear cluster of support tickets around JIT provisioning and SSO configuration, directly informing Q2 prioritization.
keyMoments.speaker: Sofia Petrov

keyMoments.text: Ananya details three distinct SCIM sync failure modes and notes the need for disciplined testing given reduced customer trust following the March Detect outage.
keyMoments.speaker: Ananya Sharma

keyMoments.text: Alex highlights that SentinelShield already offers adaptive MFA and the team keeps getting asked about it in enterprise deals, underscoring competitive urgency.
keyMoments.speaker: Alex Reyes

keyMoments.text: Alex shares that the Comply team's Priya confirmed identity access events are a major gap in SOC 2 reports, validating the audit trail as a high-impact cross-module feature.
keyMoments.speaker: Alex Reyes
